nasb.text: A wise man will hear and increase in learning, And a man of understanding will acquire wise counsel,

esv.text: Let the wise hear and increase in learning, and the one who understands obtain guidance,

cnv.text: 使智慧人聽了，可以增長學問， 使聰明人聽了，可以獲得智謀；

ccb.text: 使智者听了长学问， 明哲听了得指引；

csbs.text: 让智慧人听了，就增添学问， 让有悟性的人得到指引，
